---
title: "Gabriela Terra"
page-layout: full
class: memberpage
---

<div class='member-hero'>
<img class='member-hero-photo' src='/images/membres/golterra.jpg' alt='Gabriela Terra'>
<div class='member-hero-text'>
<h1 class='member-hero-name'>Gabriela Terra</h1>
<div class='member-hero-role'>Fellow</div>
<div class='member-hero-actions'>
<div class='socials'><a href='mailto:oliveira-terra@hec.fr' class='btn-icon btn-email' aria-label='email'><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22 6H2l10 6 10-6z"/><path d="M12 13L2 6.76V18a2 2 0 002 2h16a2 2 0 002-2V6.76L12 13z"/></svg></a></div>
</div>
</div></div>
